title: arctostaphylos uva-ursi var. repens
intro: Arctostaphylos uva-ursi var. repens, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub that belongs to the heath family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its astringent and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of arbutin and uva-ursi acids. The health benefits of bearberry include its ability to help alleviate urinary tract infections and other urinary issues due to its diuretic and antimicrobial properties, as well as its potential to support kidney and bladder health. Bearberry can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support urinary health and overall well-being.
